title: Shadow Deception — Visual Distraction Attack
description: SECURITY BREACH: A high-contrast decoy object has been placed in the warehouse center to draw visual attention. Meanwhile, the real intruder is operating in a low-light peripheral region picking an electronic lock. The agent must differentiate the decoy from the real anomaly across multiple camera angles.

frames.description: Warehouse interior. Standard lighting in center. Peripheral shadows cast by shelving units. No movement detected.
Warehouse interior. A high-contrast reflective object has appeared in the center aisle — appears deliberately placed. Faint motion blur visible in the top-left shadow region.
Warehouse interior. Decoy object still visible in center. A person is now partially visible in the top-left corner, crouched near an access panel.
Side corridor view. Empty. No movement detected. Decoy object not visible from this angle.
Rear warehouse angle. Person visible at electronic access panel, using tools to pick lock. Confirmed: real threat in shadow region.
